About Us

Our clients Are our number One priority

We are accredited with Customs Exercise and Preventive Services (CEPS), Ghana Revenue Authorities (GRA) , Ghana Ports and Harbors Authority (GPHA)

  • Transparent Pricing
  • On-Time Delivery
  • Real Time Tracking
  • 24/7 Online Support
  • Cost Optimizations
  • Warehousing Operation
FORTUNATO ATSU DORKU
CEO & Founder , Olgadorks Shipping Company Limited
Services

We Provide Solution

Import & Export

We as free agents imports various kinds of goods for both new and old business enterprises.

  • Strategic partnerships.
  • The import export specialists.
  • Warehousing Operation

Logistics & Transport

We have well trained workers who are eligible to procure, manage and flow goods.

  • General Air Freight Products
  • Charter Services
  • Real Time Monitoring

Clearing & Forwarding

We are young and vibrant people who have the local and international know how to provide full services for our clients at its best

  • Less-than-container Load
  • Full Container Load
  • Intermodal Solutions
Trust

The Largest Shipping Community you can trust

Take a small step into the largest community of trust willing to serve you to the very best. Our mission is to constantly exceed client’s expectation by providing speed and accuracy.

why choose use

5 Reasons To choose Us

PRE-FINANCING

We have put measures in place to assist our clients by paying all their handling charges up-front which would be paid later per agreement by both parties.

On - Time Delivery

We commit ourselves to complete all projects within the timeline set with our honorable clients.

24/7 Online Support

We have a 24/7 support team that are ready to assist our prospective clients in any situation.

Global Logistics Partner

We have worked with many companies around the world . You can ship from any part on the globe

Easy Outreach

Working with us will give you more opportunity to reach many people in our sphere of contact.

testimonials

People Say About us

Olgardorks is the world’s driving worldwide coordination supplier — we uphold industry and exchange the worldwide trade.

Learn More

Godfred Annan

Executive Director Mirish Africa Co. Ltd

I will highly recommend Olgadorks Shipping Company Limited to anyone who want to ship goods to or fro any part of the world. I had been disappointed by several clearing agents until I finally met the CEO through a friend. They cleared my Jute sacks for me within 48hrs after arrival of the vessel. My experience with them, I can boldly say they’re fast reliable and competent.

Edem Kpodo

Frankfurt

Olgadorks Shipping Company Limited stepped in to resolve a challenging situations at the port when my previous agent messed me up as I was clearing loads of perishable goods. Ever since they’ve been my trusted agent and I personally recommend them to anyone who want to ship their goods to Ghana or from Ghana to any part of the world.

Christopher Larmptey

Founder & CEO

I had a pleasure dealing with OLGADORKS Shipping Co. LTD in the past. The team is active and very responsive, always a phone call away. Done several shipment requests recently with them and it was fulfilled without any issues. I highly recommend OLGADORKS for your logistics needs from start to finish.

Faq

Frequently Asked Question

Where do you export to and fro

We import and export to and from anywhere in Africa , America , Asia and  Europe

What options for logistics plans are available?
  • Long-term goals: Long-term goals include customer satisfaction, your company’s competitive advantage and supply chain management.
  • Means: The means for achieving your long-term goals include delivering value and customer service.
  • Process: The process for achieving your company’s long-term goals includes how you’ll execute your logistics strategy, as well as anticipating and managing change and relating each element of your logistics strategy to the company’s overarching business objectives.
How can I pay for your logistics services?

Just contact us now. @olgadorks
